title: Dimensionality Reduction Visualization
description: Interactive p5.js MicroSim that projects 30 high-dimensional word embeddings to 2D, letting students compare PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP layouts with hover, click, and connection-line interactions.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Compare how PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP project high-dimensional word embeddings to 2D while preserving relative distances.
